Patch Set 1: -Code-Review

Oops, thought this was AAI.

Patch Set 1:

Required to replace expired intermediate certificate - critical

Patch Set 1:

I am trying to test this review, however aaf sms is constantly failing healthcheck.
Is it relevant?
Also, without https://gerrit.onap.org/r/#/c/50901/ aaf does not start on my environment on Windriver.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+2 Verified+1

Managed to deploy aaf successfully. NFS on my env had problems.
